slot_name: Vista Aérea Cenital de Obra en Suelo Cercana
camera_height_block: high angle, directly overhead, zenithal, looking straight down onto the floor
lens_block: standard to wide-angle lens, ensuring minimal distortion for the artwork, capturing surrounding context elegantly
vertical_tilt_block: 90 degrees downward tilt, perfectly perpendicular to the floor
lateral_rotation_block: 0 degrees lateral rotation, perfectly level with the horizontal plane
composition_block: artwork centered and dominant, occupying significant frame space, the entire or nearly entire artwork visible, floor as the primary visual plane, subtle surrounding context visible in the background providing depth without distracting from the artwork
human_subject_block: no human subjects, an empty and pristine interior space
scale_block: artwork shown to real-world scale, accurately proportioned to surrounding environment elements like furniture or architectural lines, appearing as a genuine physical object
depth_of_field_block: moderate depth of field, artwork in sharp focus, with a gentle, artistic blur for background elements to enhance the focus on the artwork
negative_directives: no distorted perspective of the artwork
no artwork appearing as if it's floating
full_prompt_template: A high-angle, zenithal aerial view looking directly down from above onto the floor of a pristine, modern interior space. A single, physical {{ARTWORK_ORIENTATION}} artwork, '{{ARTWORK_TITLE}}', with dimensions of {{ARTWORK_WIDTH_CM}}cm by {{ARTWORK_HEIGHT_CM}}cm, is lying horizontally flat on the floor, perfectly centered and prominent within the frame. The floor itself is the primary visual plane, showcasing a refined texture such as polished concrete, light oak, or a luxurious minimalist rug. The full extent of the artwork is visible. Surrounding elements providing elegant, subtle context may include the edge of a low-profile coffee table, the corner of a designer sofa, or distinct floor lines, illuminated by soft, natural ambient light filtering from an unseen window. The scene emphasizes realism and a high-end aesthetic. Photorealistic, ultra-detailed, premium quality. IMAGE 1 as the central artwork, IMAGE 2 for environmental and textural inspiration. {{CAMERA_SLOT_ID}}, {{CAMERA_SLOT_NAME}}, {{ARTWORK_SIZE_CLASS}}.

_studio.brief: Crear una cámara de vista aérea cenital desde arriba. La obra no está colgada en la pared: está apoyada horizontalmente sobre el piso, como un canvas u obra física acostada. La cámara mira desde arriba, casi perpendicular al suelo, mostrando el piso como plano principal y la obra completa o casi completa dentro de la composición. La escena puede incluir contexto alrededor, como alfombra, mesa baja, sofá, cortinas, ventanas o líneas del piso, pero la obra debe ser el sujeto principal y debe leerse como una pieza real colocada sobre el suelo. Evitar vista de pared, evitar obra vertical, evitar mockup frontal tradicional.
